economic_notes: GBEs include Tuytaxun General Store Ltd. (100%), Salpac Fisheries Limited Partnership (49.90%), Petroglyph Development Group Ltd. (100%), Petroglyph Development Group Limited Partnership (99%). Audit qualified due to unaudited investment carrying values for Tuytaxun General Store Ltd. and Salpac Fisheries LP, and missing financial info for Salpac Fisheries LP for year ended March 31, 2021.
notes: Qualified audit opinion due to inability to verify investment carrying values for Tuytaxun General Store Ltd. and Salpac Fisheries LP (unaudited), and missing financial info for Salpac Fisheries LP for FY2021. Chief and Council chose not to disclose condensed supplementary financial information of GBEs/GBPs publicly to protect competitive edge. Prior year figures are restated. Prior period adjustment of $156,728 in 2021 and ($479,850) in 2020. Total government transfers calculated as: ISC $9,946,713 + CMHC $252,274 + FNHA $3,062,657 + BC Gaming $737,188 + BC Housing $388,992 + BC Treaty Commission $300,000 + Coast Salish Employment $432,669 + FNESC $390,980 + DFO $330,750 + Province of BC $1,641,268 = $17,483,491 less deferred revenue other negative $221,609 excluded; OSR includes rental, miscellaneous, trust fund income, GBP/GBE gains. Large investment in Petroglyph Development Group LP of $11,676,167 during year. Long-term debt increased significantly from $9,243,312 to $21,169,907 with loan proceeds of $11,850,300.
